title: Exec Format Error running amd64 on arm64
body:
### Issue Description

I'm recieving the following error: ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/da1784f0-182d-47fe-a425-e0824a090471)



### Steps to reproduce the issue

Steps to reproduce the issue
1. Install podman on an arm64 device
2. Run this command: ![Image](https://github.com/user-attachments/assets/da1784f0-182d-47fe-a425-e0824a090471)


### Describe the results you received

The above image shows the error.

### Describe the results you expected

Well, I expected it to run successfully.

### podman info output

### Podman in a container

No

### Privileged Or Rootless

Rootless

### Upstream Latest Release

No (I currently don't have time to compile from source, so I'm using the version from latest alpine edge)

### Additional environment details

I'm on a Oneplus 6T running PostmarketOS.

### Additional information

_No response_

comments.body:
You need to install an emulator like qemu-user-static that is registered via binfmt_misc. Note that will will be slower than native and its capabilities are limited.


---

Also please copy pasta the proper error messages and do not provide screenshots from terminal text.

> You need to install an emulator like qemu-user-static that is registered via binfmt_misc. Note that will will be slower than native and its capabilities are limited.
> 
> Also please copy pasta the proper error messages and do not provide screenshots from terminal text.

I have to install that natively or on the podman machine?
